title: Remote and Hybrid Work Policy: Eligibility and Expectations
text:
Q: What are the eligibility criteria and expectations for remote and hybrid work at our company?
A: Employees may be eligible for remote or hybrid work arrangements based on their role, performance, and team needs. To apply for remote or hybrid work, employees should submit a request to their direct manager at least four weeks prior to the desired start date. Managers will evaluate requests based on job responsibilities, team collaboration requirements, and individual performance. If approved, employees are expected to maintain regular communication with their team and attend mandatory in-person meetings as scheduled. Additionally, employees must adhere to the company's work hours and be available during core business hours. For any questions or to initiate a request, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com.
